_logPathComment: Optional folder for popup.log. Omit to use the default (%LocalAppData%\CcswPopup\); also editable from the tray icon's Settings... menu.
_tokenComment: Shared relay auth token (X-CCSW-Token header). Get it from the relay's private auth.config.php. Leave empty while the relay is in grace mode (AUTH_ENFORCE=false); required once auth is enforced.
